posts.author: Han (Kuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
Happy Monday to everyone. Here is a random question.
Is there anyway to hide the red frame parts? I do not need the footer show those info + the text column’s emoji icons are not needed either.

Best regards
Han

image1338×203 24.9 KB

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Han

Not sure about the emoticons, looks like you can’t get rid of them

The summaries can be switched on/off by changing the column settings.
